subject: Armored youth with short blond hair wielding a large ornate staff, surrounded by swirling magical energy and blue butterflies
description: A young person with short blond hair wears blue and dark armor and swings a large ornate staff or scepter in a dynamic action pose. Behind and around them, a large circular teal-and-gold magical disc of swirling energy dominates the composition. Blue butterflies scatter across the background, which is a muted purple-brown. The anime-style linework is bold and expressive, with the figure occupying the lower-center of the card art. The pose conveys momentum and forward motion.
foreground: Armored youth mid-swing with an ornate staff, blue armor, dramatic pose
background: Swirling teal-and-gold magical energy disc, blue butterflies, muted purple-brown atmosphere
